loginCheckJs: (function(a){var r=a.url(),o=a.body(),t=a.code();if(o&&200===t&&(o.includes('加载中')||o.includes('userverify'))){var c=source.get('verify_count')||'0';c=parseInt(c)+1;source.put('verify_count',c);if(c<=3){try{var h=java.webView(r,r,'setTimeout(function(){window.legado.getHTML(document.documentElement.outerHTML);},3000);');if(h&&!h.includes('加载中')&&!h.includes('userverify')){source.put('verify_count','0');return java.connect(r)}}catch(e){}}java.toast('需要验证');java.startBrowserAwait(r,'验证');source.put('verify_count','0');return java.connect(r)}return a})(result)
